title: rubus hirsutus f. harae
intro: Rubus hirsutus f. harae, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species within the genus Rubus. It is a type of bramble native to the Himalayan region, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which may help protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and cell damage, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Himalayan raspberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal use, with reported benefits including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
